title: Álvaro Arbeloa out as Real Madrid сoach by May 31, 2026?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Álvaro Arbeloa permanently ceases to be the сoach of Real Madrid before May 31, 2026, 23:59 UTC. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO".

Temporary absences (including but not limited to medical leave, compassionate leave, suspension, or touchline bans) will not be considered.

An announcement of Álvaro Arbeloa’s resignation/firing before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "YES", regardless of when the announced resignation/firing goes into effect.

This market's primary resolution source will be official information from Real Madrid and/or Álvaro Arbeloa. However, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

title: BCH above $433.66 on Apr 8, 17:00 UTC?
rulesText: This market will resolve to "YES" if the opening price of the 1-minute BCH (https://tradingview.com/chart/?symbol=PYTH:BCHUSD) candle on Apr 8, 2026, at 17:00 UTC is above $433.66. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "NO". The resolution is based on data from the Pyth Network.

title: Will Brighton have 6+ shots on target vs Burnley on April 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Brighton records 6 or more shots on target in the Burnley vs Brighton Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 14:00 UTC, as reported in the FBRef.com match report for this specific game. Otherwise, it will resolve to “NO.”

Shots on target (SoT) will be determined using the team total shown in the “SoT” column in the Brighton Player Stats section.

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to “NO.”

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: Burnley vs Brighton: Will a substitute score a goal on April 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if at least one player who was not in the starting XI for either Burnley or Brighton (i.e., did not start the match) scores a goal after entering as a substitute in the Burnley vs Brighton Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 14:00 UTC, as recorded in the official FBRef.com match report for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to "NO."

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: Will Mitoma complete 2+ successful dribbles vs Burnley on April 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Kaoru Mitoma completes 2 or more successful dribbles in the Burnley vs Brighton Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 14:00 UTC, as shown on the FotMob match page for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

The successful dribbles count will be determined using the value shown on the FotMob match page under Stats → Player stats → Attack → Successful dribbles (e.g., “1/2 (50%)” = 1) for Kaoru Mitoma. This value will be taken from the match page once the match is completed.

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to “NO.”

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

Will Lionel Messi play in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
rulesText:
The 2026 FIFA World Cup is a major soccer tournament held from June 11 to July 19, 2026, with games at multiple stadiums across North America.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Lionel Messi takes the field as a player in at least one official match for Argentina during the 2026 FIFA World Cup at the group stage or later. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Any on-field appearance as a player will qualify, in regulation, stoppage time, extra time, for a shootout, etc.

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from FIFA (https://www.fifa.com/), however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

title: Will Neymar play in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Neymar da Silva Santos Júnior takes the field as a player in at least one official match for Brazil during the 2026 FIFA World Cup at the group stage or later. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Any on-field appearance as a player will qualify, in regulation, stoppage time, extra time, for a shootout, etc.

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from FIFA (https://www.fifa.com/), however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

title: Will there be a goal from a corner in Liverpool vs Fulham on Apr 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if either team scores at least one goal officially designated as originating from a corner kick situation in the Liverpool vs Fulham Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 16:30 UTC, as shown on the FotMob match page for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

A goal from a corner will be determined using the FotMob shot map, where the situation is labeled as "From corner" and the result is "Goal." This value will be taken from the match page once the match is completed.

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to "NO."

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: Will Liverpool start Van Dijk, Salah & Gakpo vs Fulham on April 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Virgil van Dijk, Mohamed Salah, and Cody Gakpo are all listed in Liverpool’s starting XI for the Liverpool vs Fulham Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 16:30 UTC, as reported in the official FBRef.com match report for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to "NO."

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: #SlotOut? Will Fulham score before 25 mins vs Liverpool on Apr 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Fulham scores at least one goal before the first 25 minutes (1’ to 25’ incl.) in the Liverpool vs Fulham Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 16:30 UTC. The goal must be officially credited to Fulham (including own goals by Liverpool in Fulham's favor) and recorded in the FBRef.com match report for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to “NO.”

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: Will Everton make 4+ shots outside box vs Brentford on April 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Everton records 4 or more shots outside the box in the Brentford vs Everton Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 14:00 UTC. Otherwise, it will resolve to “NO.”

The shots outside the box count will be determined using Everton’s “Shots outside box” value shown on Fotmob on the match page under Shots → Shots outside box for this specific game. This value will be taken from the match page once the match is completed.

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to “NO.”

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: Will Everton start Mykolenko, Tarkowski & Dewsbury-Hall vs Brentford?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if Vitaliy Mykolenko, James Tarkowski, and Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall are all listed in Everton’s starting XI in the Brentford vs Everton Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 14:00 UTC, as reported in the FBRef.com match report for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to “NO.”

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.

title: Will Garner have 6+ passes into final third vs Brentford on April 11?
rulesText:
This market will resolve to "YES" if James Garner records 6 or more passes into the final third in the Brentford vs Everton Premier League match scheduled for April 11, 2026, 14:00 UTC, as shown on the FotMob match page for this specific game. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "NO."

The passes into the final third count will be determined using the value on the FotMob match page under Stats → Player stats → Passes → Passes into final third for James Garner. This value will be taken from the match page once the match is completed.

Note: Passes into the final third are completed passes that move the ball into the attacking team’s final third of the pitch.

If the match is not played and completed with an official result by May 11, 2026, 12:00 UTC, the market will resolve to “NO.”

If the data on the website is unavailable for 72 hours after the match is completed, a consensus of credible reporting will be used.
